topic: Presidential trust vs. political accountability in the Philippines
tweet1: President Marcos publicly declared trust in DILG Sec. Remulla today, even as other officials face graft charges and systemic corruption claims persist.
tweet2: @ABSCBNNews reports President Marcos still trusts DILG Secretary Jonvic Remulla, despite “certain issues” involving Zaldy Co and Sen. dela Rosa. This signals presidential endorsement amidst controversy.
tweet3: Meanwhile, @ABSCBNNews also reported former DPWH Sec. Manuel Bonoan posted P90k bail for graft today. Sen. Jinggoy Estrada also posted bail for his own graft case. Accountability seems selective.
tweet4: This pattern suggests a double standard: loyalty can override serious allegations, while others face legal action. The public deserves consistent accountability from all in power.
